utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah . You will not be able to take it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So uh , now that little Chandler turned out to be a girl , what are they gonna name her ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: They are gonna call her Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is kind of a masculine name , do not you think ?
